name: Outlook-style Quote Headers
author: Bulwark Mail Community
description: Replaces the default reply/forward quote header with an Outlook-style From / Sent / To / Cc / Subject block. The original message follows directly, with no blockquote indent.

applyTo.label: Apply to
applyTo.description: Which actions should use the Outlook-style header.

boldLabels.label: Bold field labels
boldLabels.description: Render From / Sent / To / Cc / Subject in bold.

thinRuleAbove.label: Thin rule above the header
thinRuleAbove.description: Insert a thin horizontal line above the header to separate the reply from the quoted message.
